query_title: Night Is Short, Walk On Girl

recommendations.title: Ride Your Wave
recommendations.overview: Hinako is a surf-loving college student who has just moved to a small seaside town. When a sudden fire breaks out at her apartment building, she is rescued by Minato, a handsome firefighter, and the two soon fall in love.

recommendations.title: Mind Game
recommendations.overview: Nishi is a loser who has a crush on his childhood girlfriend. After an encounter with the Japanese mafia, he journeys to heaven and back, and ends up trapped in an even more unlikely place.

recommendations.title: Lu Over the Wall
recommendations.overview: In a small fishing village, a gloomy middle school student named Kai meets a mermaid named Lu.

recommendations.title: Inu-Oh
recommendations.overview: A cursed dancer and a blind musician — both ostracized by society — become business partners and inseparable friends as their larger-than-life concerts propel them to stardom in 14th century Japan.

recommendations.title: Cat Soup
recommendations.overview: The surreal black comedy follows Nyatta, an anthropomorphic kitten, on his travel to the land of the dead and back in an effort to save his sister's soul.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: Love Untangled
recommendations.overview: A lovestruck teen plans to win the school heartthrob by going from curly to straight hair — until a new transfer student changes everything.
